_provenance.sourceTitle: APPENDIX VI – NDCC Ballroom Syllabus Step List, Competitions & Medal Test
_provenance.sourceAuthor: George Pytlik / National Dance Council of Canada
_provenance.column: Tango (column 2 of 4: Waltz · Tango · Foxtrot · Quickstep)
_provenance.method: Verbatim transcription from a 220-DPI rasterization of the page. Names are exactly as printed; nothing expanded, corrected, or inferred.
_provenance.status: EXTRACTED — pending Victor's confirmation. Not yet audited.
_provenance.rules: Figure-name → tier/number is dance content. This file is the verbatim NDCC side only. Matching these names to ballroomguide figure names is a separate step done by Claude Code, with fuzzy/unmatched pairs flagged for Victor (never guessed).
notes: syllabusNumber is per-dance and cumulative across tiers — Tango runs its own 1..27 sequence, NOT a global number shared with the other dances.
Figure 4 prints as 'Closed' — appears truncated (NDCC/ISTD Tango commonly lists 'Closed Promenade'). Transcribed verbatim, NOT expanded. CONFIRM intended name. (flag on the figure record.)
Figure 5 'Promenade Rock Turn' wraps across two printed lines ('Promenade Rock' / 'Turn'); it is one figure.
Gold Star tier lists no individual figures: the source states 'Steps 1 – 27 plus Gold Star groups / Fig. 1 – 27 plus groupes Etoile d'Or'. No Gold Star figure records are emitted.
Tier labels are bilingual in the source (e.g. 'Beginners - Débutants', 'Gold - Or'); syllabusLevel uses the English form to match existing data.js Waltz entries.

figures.flag: Prints as 'Closed' in source — possibly truncated 'Closed Promenade'. Confirm before use.

figures.ndccName: Open Reverse Turn, Lady in Line
Left Foot and Right Foot Rocks
